Post.title: Post
Post.description: A piece of content published by an admin.

title.description: The title or headline of the post.

content.description: The main text or body of the post.

mediaUrl.description: URL to the media asset (image, video, audio).

authorId.description: UID of the admin who posted this.

GroupMessage.title: Group Message
GroupMessage.description: A message sent in the AI Party group chat.

/posts/{postId}.description: Public stream of all content published by administrators.

/group_messages/{messageId}.description: Messages for the AI Party group chat room.
